RDIA.Label: Health & Wellness
RDIA.Description: Address prevalent health and therapeutic challenges in the Kingdom.

RDIA.Label: Sustainable Environment & Supply of Essential Needs
RDIA.Description: Secure sustainable access to water, food, and energy resources for the population and industries.

RDIA.Label: Energy & Industrial Leadership
RDIA.Description: Maintain and strengthen Saudi Arabia's global leadership in the energy sector while diversifying into new areas.

RDIA.Label: Economies of the Future
RDIA.Description: Reimagine urban living and establish Saudi Arabia as a global leader in future-oriented sectors.
